message:
refactor: remove redundant min/max functions for Go 1.21+ builtins

Since Go 1.21+, min and max are built-in functions. Removed redundant
custom implementations that were shadowing the builtins:

- internal/coordinator/quality.go: removed max() and min()
- internal/tui/dashboard/layout.go: removed min()
- internal/status/compaction_test.go: removed min()
- internal/scanner/priority.go: removed max()

This project targets Go 1.25, so the built-in min/max are available.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
